---
description: "Write test cases using TDD for OE Manager GUI features"
agent: "tdd-guide"
argument-hint: "Describe the feature to test"
---

Guide test-driven development for the specified feature.

1. Define test cases in Given/When/Then format
2. Create browser console test snippets
3. Cover happy path, edge cases, and error handling
4. Provide a test execution checklist

Test categories to consider:
- API tests (endpoint URLs, response parsing, error handling)
- UI tests (element rendering, event binding, state updates)
- Integration tests (full user flows)
